prompt: A bright, chaotic theatrical comedy movie poster in a polished Hollywood one-sheet style, vertical composition, with a retro yellow Mini Cooper speeding straight toward the viewer down a sunny palm-lined city street. The car is packed with exactly 5 vacationing friends: 2 visible in the front seats, 2 partially visible squeezed in the back, and 1 man sprawled on the roof luggage, pointing dramatically forward with a wild grin. Everyone wears colorful casual vacation clothes, including tropical prints, relaxed shirts, and sun hats. The scene feels loud, reckless, and fun. On the roof are stacked suitcases and travel bags. A police car with flashing lights chases from the rear right background. On the left side, a crooked wooden signpost has exactly 3 signs reading "BEACH", "MOUNTAINS", and "WHAT COULD GO WRONG?". A squawking seagull perches on top of the signpost. On the right side, a giant roadside donut shop sign reads "DONUT" and a folded paper map flies through the air. The street is full of motion blur, dust, debris, and tire energy, with a saturated blue sky and fluffy clouds above. At the very top, place exactly 4 actor names in black condensed caps: "DAVE JOHNSON", "LILY WANG", "KEVIN HARTLEY", and "AMY CHEN". Beneath that, add a stacked tagline in bold caps: "THEY CAME. THEY SAW." in dark navy, and "THEY MESSED EVERYTHING UP." in red. The main title dominates the upper middle in huge playful 3D typography: "VACATION MODE", with "VACATION" in bright yellow and "MODE" in white, heavy blue shadowing, and the O replaced by a simple smiling face wearing sunglasses. Add small doodle-like yellow accent marks around the title. Across the lower right of the title, place a tilted hot-pink banner reading "A COMEDY ABOUT BAD IDEAS & GOOD TIMES" with a hand-drawn curved arrow pointing down. The car license plate reads "NO PLAN ALL FUN". Near the bottom, add a glowing pull-quote in yellow: "LAUGH-OUT-LOUD FUNNY!" and below it "- MOVIE BUZZ". At the bottom center, add the release line "ONLY IN THEATERS" and then "JUNE 20" in large bold yellow caps. Add tiny legal credits along the very bottom edge and small production logos in the corners, including "GOOD TIME FILMS" on the lower left and "NO PLAN ALL FUN" on the lower right. Use high-contrast lighting, exaggerated perspective, glossy commercial poster finish, vibrant summer colors, and a goofy road-trip comedy tone.
